name: TRIX(10) Zero-Cross
description: Uses a 9-period TRIX indicator per stock to identify sustained momentum. Each month, holds equal shares of tech stocks whose TRIX is positive, rotating entirely to T-bills when all five are bearish.
overfit_notes: Single TRIX(9) indicator, standard textbook period, single zero-line threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: TRIX(9) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: All stocks bearish: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal+Execution: AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Monthly, first trading day, 30 min after open

name: TRIX(15) Zero-Cross
description: Applies a 14-period TRIX to the same tech-stock basket. The slightly longer period smooths short-term noise while still capturing monthly momentum shifts.
overfit_notes: Single TRIX(14), standard period, zero-line threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: TRIX(14) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: All stocks bearish: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal+Execution: AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Monthly, first trading day, 30 min after open

name: TRIX(15) Zero-Cross
description: Uses a 21-period TRIX per stock, shifting to a near-monthly smoothing cycle. Holds equal-weight long positions in stocks with positive triple-smoothed momentum.
overfit_notes: Single TRIX(21), period near calendar-month, zero-line threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: TRIX(21) > 0 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: All stocks bearish: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal+Execution: AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Monthly, first trading day, 30 min after open

name: Z-Score(20+60) Dual Momentum
description: Z-score(20) with a raised +0.5 threshold requiring price to be half a standard deviation above the mean. A stricter entry filter reduces false signals in choppy sideways markets.
overfit_notes: Single z-score(20), threshold tuned to +0.5 (non-zero, mildly fitted)

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Z-score(20) > 0.5 per stock: equal-weight among bullish stocks

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Z-score drops below 0.5: remove stock

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal+Execution: AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Monthly, first trading day, 30 min after open

name: CCI(20) >0 Bull
description: CCI(20) combined with a 50-day EMA price filter. Typical price must deviate positively from its mean AND the close must be above its trend line for a stock to qualify.
overfit_notes: CCI(20) + EMA(50) — two indicators with AND logic

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: CCI(20) > 0 AND price > EMA(50) per stock: equal-weight among bullish

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Either condition fails: remove stock

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal+Execution: AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Fixed basket of 5 large-cap tech stocks

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Monthly, first trading day, 30 min after open
